name: Superb Cash Advance
description_short: Superb Cash Advance in Orlando, FL at 5144 S John Young Pkwy offers emergency payday and title loans with extended hours.
description_long:
Superb Cash Advance is located at 5144 S John Young Pkwy in Orlando, FL, a accessible storefront near major retail and commercial areas. The location operates extended hours every day of the week: Monday through Friday from 8:30 AM to 8:30 PM, and Saturday and Sunday from 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM, making it convenient for Orlando residents and nearby customers.

At this Orlando location, the team provides payday loans, title loans, and other short-term cash solutions to help bridge financial gaps. The staff walks you through available options, explains terms and eligibility requirements, and answers your questions about the process. For specific inquiries or to begin an application, call 321-252-3368.

If you need quick cash in Orlando before your next paycheck, bring a valid ID, proof of income (recent pay stub or bank statement), and information about your checking account. The loan process is straightforward, and Superb Cash Advance works with borrowers in various financial situations.
address: 5144 S John Young Pkwy #3, Orlando, FL 32839

company_info.headquarters: 5144 S John Young Pkwy #3, Orlando, FL 32839

pros: Same-day loan approval and fund disbursement according to customer reviews
Extended business hours (8:30am-8:30pm weekdays) to serve working customers
Accepts all credit types with no traditional credit check requirement
Minimal documentation required for application process
Multiple loan products available ($250-$5,000 range for different needs)
Physical storefront location plus online application option
Reportedly flexible payment plans customized to individual budgets
cons: Website provides no APR, fee, or interest rate disclosures—critical pricing information absent
No stated loan terms, repayment periods, or total cost of borrowing displayed
Review content contains geographic inconsistencies (Arvada reviews on Atlanta location page, mention of title loans not listed on services)
High-cost lending product typical of payday advances, likely carrying 300%+ APR based on industry standards
No compliance information, licensing details, or regulatory disclosures visible on website
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history facing immediate cash emergencies
Workers needing rapid funds (same-day) without extensive application requirements
Individuals seeking flexible repayment schedules aligned with their pay cycle
diagnosis: Superb Cash Advance is best for consumers in genuine financial emergencies who cannot access traditional credit and need same-day funds, despite the high cost. The critical caveat is the complete absence of APR and fee disclosures on their website—consumers must contact them directly and compare rates before borrowing, as payday loans typically cost far more than traditional alternatives. This product should be a last resort, not a primary borrowing solution.
services: In-person loan services at physical location
meta_description: Superb Cash Advance at 5144 S John Young Pkwy, Orlando, FL. Quick payday and title loans with extended weekend hours.
